questions.main_text: What would the woman probably say next?

content.text: What would the woman probably say next?

options.text: I’d say her fighting spirit.
It’s so many things, maybe due to her cheating a bit.
But it’s probably because of her natural ability.

questions.main_text: What does the research team focus on when releasing mosquitos?

content.text: What does the research team focus on when releasing mosquitos?

options.text: Wet areas where there are concentrations of them
Placing them into all parts of the grid
The direction and currents of the wind

questions.main_text: What is one of the things recommended for your studies?

content.text: What is one of the things recommended for your studies?

options.text: Don’t miss out on meals
Don’t postpone things
Don’t disregard daily exercise

questions.main_text: What should asthma medication do?

content.text: What should asthma medication do?

options.text: Relieve the likelihood of genetic asthmas and coughing symptoms
Take care of one of two alternative problems
Fight bronchial contraction and infections

questions.main_text: How great a threat is dengue fever?

content.text: How great a threat is dengue fever?

options.text: It is almost as bad as malaria
It involves hundreds of millions of cases a year
It is the worst disease we now face

questions.main_text: What type of problem does Roger’s athleticism cause for Pierre?

content.text: What type of problem does Roger’s athleticism cause for Pierre?

options.text: It’s difficult to keep the exercise program interesting
It’s difficult to find challenging enough activities
It’s difficult to give an adequate reason for all the exercises

questions.main_text: What would the man probably say next?

content.text: What would the man probably say next?

options.text: And where am I going to get the money now?
It’s all quite understandable.
How much will I have to loan him now?

questions.main_text: According to Pierre, what demonstrates Roger’s physicality?

content.text: According to Pierre, what demonstrates Roger’s physicality?

options.text: His playing styles are so versatile
His command of the baseline
His step patterns

questions.main_text: What would the woman probably say next?

content.text: What would the woman probably say next?

options.text: Well, they probably had a big fight.
Uh, she most likely really doesn’t like him.
I don’t know, why don’t you go ahead and ask him?

questions.main_text: What does Maria think microdonations will allow?

content.text: What does Maria think microdonations will allow?

options.text: They will free the internet for further developments
They will replace commercial content with information
They will get in-depth information to internet users

questions.main_text: Who funds this service?

content.text: Who funds this service?

options.text: The national government
The local library
A network of volunteers

questions.main_text: What’s the main reason Roger Federer remains a leading player?

content.text: What’s the main reason Roger Federer remains a leading player?

options.text: Because of his psychological capacities
Because of his focus on the here and now
Because of his physical capabilities

questions.main_text: What is Pierre’s sports background?

content.text: What is Pierre’s sports background?

options.text: Football
Tennis
General athletics

questions.main_text: Mitä 99-vuotias teki syntymäpäivänään ja miksi?

– kerätäkseen rahaa sairaalalle/hyväntekeväisyyteen (2,5 p.)

content.text: Mitä 99-vuotias teki syntymäpäivänään ja miksi?

content.text: What would the man probably say next?

options.text: She is an under-appreciated artist!
But he hasn’t got much money now.
And now Tony should show his gratitude to her.

questions.main_text: What model of the internet does Maria Popova support?

content.text: What model of the internet does Maria Popova support?

options.text: One bringing more personal development to people
One guaranteeing free information to all
One giving people greater access around the world

questions.main_text: _Answer questions 1–26 by choosing the __**best**__ alternative._

content.text: _Answer questions 1–26 by choosing the __**best**__ alternative._

– sytytti (savukkeen)sytyttimen talossa (2,5 p.)

questions.main_text: What is Pierre saying when he speaks about languages?

content.text: What is Pierre saying when he speaks about languages?

options.text: Roger is very focused, hyperactive and driven
Roger is very intellectual and media smart
Roger is very imaginative, rapid and strong

questions.main_text: What does Maria want us to do?

content.text: What does Maria want us to do?

options.text: To move towards good judgement
To invent a new way of thinking about the internet
To readjust our emotional responses

questions.main_text: Mitä sanotaan Hans Olav Lahlumin puhetavasta, ja mitä hän teki saavutettuaan aikaisemman ennätyksen?
questions.feedback:
– puhuu lähes taukoamatta / pitää puhuessaan vain muutamien sekuntien taukoja (2,5 p.)

– aloitti keskustelun norjalaisesta näytelmäkirjailijasta / Henrik Ibsenistä / toisesta/uudesta aiheesta (2,5 p.)

content.text: Mitä sanotaan Hans Olav Lahlumin puhetavasta, ja mitä hän teki saavutettuaan aikaisemman ennätyksen?

questions.main_text: What is their research focused on?

content.text: What is their research focused on?

options.text: Destroying female mosquitos specifically
Eliminating the mosquitos by using pesticides
Reducing the mosquitos through reproduction

questions.main_text: What’s Pierre Paganini’s contribution to Roger Federer’s career?

content.text: What’s Pierre Paganini’s contribution to Roger Federer’s career?

options.text: He provides an unchanging factor for Roger
He helped to start Roger’s career
He keeps Roger doing the same things

questions.main_text: What happens after you’ve had dengue once?

content.text: What happens after you’ve had dengue once?

options.text: You have an increased risk of getting it again
You are immune to the disease
You are usually given antibiotics for the disease

questions.main_text: Which of the following is a piece of advice for when you fall out of your canoe?

content.text: Which of the following is a piece of advice for when you fall out of your canoe?

options.text: Swim straight to the river bank
Get a leg over the canoe
Avoid getting trapped

− TV-kamera näytti tekohampaat nurmikolla (2,5 p.)

questions.main_text: According to Maria, what is the worst thing about the web?

content.text: According to Maria, what is the worst thing about the web?

options.text: Its way of handling material
How it handles trivial events
What it does to get a handle on matters

questions.main_text: What would the man probably say next?

content.text: What would the man probably say next?

options.text: I understand, but aren’t there any regulations about that?
I know, so what were they thinking of?
I hear you, so why do we really want to agree with them?

questions.main_text: What are people willing to pay for on Longreads?

options.text: Correcting their free internet materials
Analysing truly free internet materials
Finding free internet materials for them

questions.main_text: What would the woman probably say next?

content.text: What would the woman probably say next?

options.text: Uhm… you must not quite understand.
Yeah… I’ve been helping him.
Well, that’s not really very much.

questions.main_text: What does Maria Popova do about advertising on her website?

content.text: What does Maria Popova do about advertising on her website?

options.text: She ignores it
She favours it
She avoids it
